title: Project Manager – Mechanical Construction (Dubai, UAE)
description_raw:
Hays Middle East are recruiting on behalf of a major EPC contractor for an experienced Project Manager to oversee the mechanical scope on a large district cooling plant in Dubai, UAE. This is a contract role with a tax-free day rate.

The district cooling plant will serve a mixed-use development in the Jebel Ali free zone. The mechanical scope covers: chilled water production and distribution (chillers, cooling towers, pumping stations), associated HVAC systems for the district network, and building services connections to individual buildings.

Role overview:
- Act as client-side PM for the £300m+ EPC mechanical package
- Manage the design review, procurement, installation and commissioning schedule (Primavera P6)
- Coordinate multi-contractor interfaces at the process interface boundaries
- Report to the client programme director on cost (EVM), schedule, and QHSE performance

Background:
- Chartered engineer (mechanical or chemical)
- 10+ years EPC project management on HVAC or district energy systems
- Familiar with ASHRAE/NFPA/BS8558 standards relevant to district cooling
- UAE driving licence (or willingness to obtain)

Rate: AED 2,200 per day (tax-free; equivalent to approximately £490/day at current exchange rates)
Duration: 24 months
Start: 1 October 2026
Location: Dubai, UAE — residential expat package available
